case_title: MARIA FRANCISCA E SANCHEZ OREA VS. MARIA DEL SOCORRO VEGA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ OREA, MARIA FRANCISCA E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGA, MARIA DEL SOCORRO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KEVIN VARGAS--SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MEREDITH SREEN--SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
